title: Lavaworks
description: A highly configurable biome lava mod.
body:
This mod adds colored lava and magma to all of the Nether Biomes. (Apart from Nether Wastes, which holds the default colors.)

This mod is highly configurable. Lava and magma colors can be changed and added to biomes that do not already have them.

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/Z8Z714G8U7)
